description: Probe run to validate run_experiment command acceptance timed out (no benchmark metrics).

asi.hypothesis: run_experiment might accept env-prefixed autoresearch.sh commands
asi.rollback_reason: timeout without metrics; this was a tooling probe, not a real benchmark
asi.next_action_hint: run actual benchmark command and capture METRIC lines

description: Baseline JIT run crashed before METRIC output (BasiliskII aborted in autoresearch.sh with set -e).

asi.hypothesis: Run JIT=true baseline through existing autoresearch.sh with AArch64 experimental configure
asi.rollback_reason: Script exited on emulator abort before emit_metrics; no datapoint captured
asi.next_action_hint: Make autoresearch.sh robust to Basilisk process abort so metrics are emitted even on crash

description: Baseline JIT=true run via autoresearch.sh with AArch64 experimental build mode. Reproduced vm_acquire_reserved assertion (reserved_assert=1).

asi.hypothesis: Current MAP_FIXED low-address path in vm_acquire_mac bypasses reserved pool setup and causes vm_acquire_reserved assert
asi.allocator_observation: Crash occurs in video_open before BOOT_STAGE markers; build succeeds
asi.next_action_hint: Move low-address bias into vm_alloc reservation path and revert vm_acquire_mac to normal vm_acquire flow
